config.name: json_nested_kv_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: json_nested_kv_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: System Activity (2001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:06:51.210877

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local tonumber = tonumber
local os_time = os.time
local string_match = string.match
local string_format = string.format

-- Constants
local REQUIRED_FIELDS = {
    ["time-generated"] = true,
    ["event-id"] = true,
    ["hostname"] = true,
    ["severity"] = true
}

-- Helper functions
local function validate_record(record)
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return false, "Invalid input record"
    end
    
    -- Check required fields exist
    for field in pairs(REQUIRED_FIELDS) do
        if record[field] == nil then
            return false, string_format("Missing required field: %s", field)
        end
    end
    
    return true
end

local function parse_timestamp(ts)
    if not ts then return nil end
    -- Optimized timestamp parsing
    local pattern = "(%d+)[/-](%d+)[/-](%d+)%s+(%d+):(%d+):(%d+)"
    local y,m,d,h,min,s = string_match(ts, pattern)
    if not y then return nil end
    return os_time({year=y, month=m, day=d, hour=h, min=min, sec=s})
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    local valid, err = validate_record(record)
    if not valid then
        return nil, err
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output structure
    local output = {
        class_uid = 2001,
        class_name = "System Activity", 
        category_uid = 2,
        category_name = "System Activity",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 200101,
        device = {},
        metadata = {
            version = "1.0.0",
            product = {
                name = "Windows Event Log",
                vendor_name = "Microsoft"
            }
        }
    }

    -- Optimized field transformations
    -- Time handling with validation
    local time = parse_timestamp(record["time-generated"])
    output.time = time and (time * 1000) or (os_time() * 1000)

    -- Direct field mappings with type validation
    output.event_uid = record["event-id"]
    output.device.hostname = record["hostname"]
    
    -- Severity conversion with validation
    local severity = tonumber(record["severity"])
    if severity and severity >= 0 and severity <= 10 then
        output.severity = severity
    end

    -- Parse nested message content
    if record.message then
        local msg = record.message
        -- Extract key-value pairs from message
        for k, v in string.gmatch(msg, "(%w+)=([^%s]+)") do
            if k == "EventCode" then
                output.event_code = tonumber(v)
            elseif k == "User" then
                output.user = {name = v}
            elseif k == "ComputerName" then
                output.device.hostname = v
            end
        end
    end

    -- Validation and enrichment
    if not output.time then
        output.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    -- Add observability metadata
    output.metadata.processed_at = os_time() * 1000
    output.metadata.parser_version = "1.0.0"

    return output
end

-- Test function for validation
local function test_transform()
    local test_record = {
        ["time-generated"] = "2024-03-12T12:16:33.959116+00:00",
        ["event-id"] = "ABC123",
        ["hostname"] = "test01",
        ["severity"] = "5",
        ["message"] = "EventCode=123 User=admin ComputerName=test01"
    }
    
    local result = transform(test_record)
    return result ~= nil
end
